descriptions: Implemented Framework:applyEjectionPhysics for custom crash handling.
Fixed ESX hunger/thirst tracking via esx_status event caching.
Hardened Server ID resolution to prevent 'ID: 0' on OneSync.
Fixed ejection directions by capturing pre-impact velocity vectors.
Resolved UI loading race conditions for Job and Cash displays.
Renamed seatbelt and engine commands to avoid resource collisions.
